idletickvillagers.config.brain_throttle_: Throttle villager brain behaviour ticks while keeping sensors active. Safe for farms.
Run brain behaviours every Nth tick (2–20). Lower = more responsive, higher = more savings.
idletickvillagers.config.dont_skip_if_hu: Never throttle villagers flagged for knockback/damage sync.
idletickvillagers.config.dont_skip_if_mo: Never throttle villagers currently in motion.
idletickvillagers.config.dont_skip_if_on: Never throttle villagers that are on fire.
idletickvillagers.config.dont_skip_if_pa: Never throttle villagers that are panicking (e.g. zombie nearby). Keeps iron farms working.
idletickvillagers.config.dont_skip_if_tr: Never throttle villagers with an active trading player.
idletickvillagers.config.enabled.tooltip: Master switch — disables all optimisations when off.
idletickvillagers.config.full_tick_skip_: Skip the entire villager tick. Very aggressive — may break farms. Off by default.
Full-tick every Nth tick (2–100). Lower = more responsive, higher = more savings.
idletickvillagers.config.title: IdleTick - Villagers Configuration
